description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular design. The exterior is predominantly white with large windows arranged in symmetrical rows, providing ample natural light. The property features a driveway with a parked car, a front entrance with a covered porch, and landscaped areas with several trees. Notably, there is a unique treehouse structure built around a large tree in the backyard, accompanied by a trampoline and a sandbox. The house also includes a solar panel array on the roof and a paved walkway leading to the main entrance. The overall layout is open and functional, blending contemporary architecture with playful outdoor amenities.
description: A modern, two-story white house with a flat roof, large windows, a driveway, and a unique backyard treehouse, complemented by a trampoline and sandbox.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, car, and the backyard with a treehouse, trampoline, and sandbox.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solar panels on the roof, the paved walkway, and the backyard amenities including the treehouse and trampoline.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the driveway, car, and the symmetrical arrangement of windows and trees at the front of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the backyard features—treehouse, trampoline, and sandbox—along with the side of the house and driveway.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a covered porch, wide steps, and a simple modern door flanked by large windows.
